subcodes.first_line: O thou servant at the Divine Threshold! Though thou dost lament thy poverty, yet thou sufferest from estrangement, grief, calamity, illness and hardship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه الهی از عسرت مینالی ولی از غربت و کربت و مصیبت و بیماری و مشقت
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
